title: clinopodium polycephalum
intro: Clinopodium polycephalum, also known as Kukui or Mountain Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, native to Hawaii. Clinopodium polycephalum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from sore throats, coughs, and colds, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Clinopodium polycephalum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
